metadata.title: Newsly Portal
metadata.description: Your trusted and up-to-date news portal.
metadata.keywords: news, current events, news portal, journalism, information, online news, daily news, international news, local news, latest news, reliable news, real-time news, tech news
metadata.guestSummary: Sign in to access your account and reserved content.
metadata.memberSummary: Shortcuts for your account, navigation, and future settings.
metadata.premiumSummary: Shortcuts for exclusive content and subscription management.

subscriberCard.descriptionGuest: Read trusted, award-winning journalism with more context. Subscribe for just $2 for 6 months.
subscriberCard.descriptionMember: Upgrade your account to unlock the full story, premium features, and subscriber-only coverage.
subscriberCard.descriptionPremium: Your premium subscription is active. Keep reading without restrictions and enjoy the full article.

sidebar.guestSummary: Sign in to save reads, track your account, and unlock what comes next.
sidebar.memberSummary: Shortcuts for your account, navigation, and future settings.

newsletter.title: Subscribe to our Newsletter
newsletter.subtitle: Stay in touch with our latest news and offers
newsletter.termsError: You must accept the terms of use and privacy policy to continue

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Sign in to keep up with the stories that matter to you.

signup.title: Create your account
signup.subtitle: Personalize your reading and receive content at your own pace.

validation.fullNameMin: Your name must be at least 2 characters
validation.passwordMin: Your password must be at least 8 characters
validation.acceptTermsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue

onboarding.title: Your daily briefing with context, not just headlines.
onboarding.description: Organize your routine with smart curation, relevant alerts, and objective reading to save time every day.
onboarding.highlightsTitle: What you unlock when you join
onboarding.highlightTwo: Quick summary of the most important stories.
onboarding.highlightThree: Alerts so you never miss critical shifts in tech.

notFound.title: The page you tried to access is not available.
notFound.description: The address may have been changed, removed, or no longer exists.
notFound.secondaryDescription: You can go back to the homepage and continue browsing the latest news.

cookiesRequired.title: Could not identify the reason for the unavailability.
cookiesRequired.description: To access this page, enable cookies in your browser.
cookiesRequired.secondaryDescription: If the problem persists, contact support.

apiUnavailable.title: We couldn't finish loading this page right now.
apiUnavailable.description: We encountered a temporary instability during the request. Our team is already monitoring the situation to restore full navigation as soon as possible.
apiUnavailable.secondaryDescription: You can try again in a few moments to continue reading the latest updates.

apiUnavailableDev.title: The configured source is api, but the backend did not respond.
apiUnavailableDev.description: The current env points to api, so the frontend tried to use the backend directly.
apiUnavailableDev.secondaryDescription: Switch NEWSLY_DATA_SOURCE to auto or mock to keep developing while the API is down.

mockDirectoryMissing.title: The src/mocks folder was not found in this local environment.
mockDirectoryMissing.description: To use local fallback, restore the src/mocks folder with the files expected by the frontend.
mockDirectoryMissing.secondaryDescriptionPrefix: If the source is set to mock, switch to auto or api and make sure the API is available until the mocks folder is restored. You can also use newsly-cli to install the mocks in the project:

datasourceEnvMissing.title: Set the data source variable to continue.
datasourceEnvMissing.description: In the local/dev environment, set NEWSLY_DATA_SOURCE (or NEXT_PUBLIC_NEWSLY_DATA_SOURCE) to api, mock, or auto.
datasourceEnvMissing.secondaryDescription: Without this explicit configuration, the frontend cannot decide the loading strategy for the homepage.

apiUnavailableUseMocks.title: The API did not respond, but mock data is available.
apiUnavailableUseMocks.description: To continue development, change the data source to mock or auto (NEWSLY_DATA_SOURCE=mock|auto).
apiUnavailableUseMocks.secondaryDescription: After adjusting the environment variable, restart the frontend to apply the new mode.

apiAndMockUnavailable.title: Could not continue: API unavailable and mocks missing.
apiAndMockUnavailable.description: In the development environment, you need at least one active data source to load the frontend.
apiAndMockUnavailable.secondaryDescription: Connect the backend or add local mocks before trying again.
